title: PayPal vs Crypto for Selling Software Online Without Stripe — An Honest Comparison
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, you're likely no stranger to the frustration of having a great product, but no way to collect payment because PayPal and Stripe are not available in your country. You've tried using VPNs or asking friends abroad to help, but these workarounds are unreliable and often against the terms of service. The real solution lies in crypto-native infrastructure, which can provide a seamless and secure payment experience for you and your customers.
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing PayPal to crypto for selling software online, it's essential to understand that you're not just comparing payment methods, but entire infrastructures. PayPal and Stripe are part of a traditional financial system with strict regulations and geographic restrictions, while crypto operates independently of these constraints. This fundamental difference has a significant impact on the usability and accessibility of each option for creators in restricted countries.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional payment platforms like PayPal and Stripe often break down for creators in restricted countries due to compliance decisions, fraud risk tiers, and banking infrastructure limitations. These platforms rely on a complex network of financial institutions and regulatory bodies, which can lead to account freezes, payment holds, and ultimately, a lack of access to funds. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to operate without these limitations, providing a more reliable and efficient payment experience.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, such as that provided by Unchained Commerce, does away with the geographic compliance layer that restricts traditional payment platforms. With crypto, creators can sell their digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about payment processor account requirements or KYC restrictions. This opens up a vast new market for creators in restricted countries, who can now reach a global audience and get paid instantly and securely.
Traditional payment platforms like PayPal and Stripe are often restricted in certain countries, leaving creators without a reliable way to accept payments.
The Real Cost Difference

While traditional payment platforms may seem like a cost-effective option at first glance, the reality is that they often come with hidden fees, chargebacks, and payment holds. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure typically offers a more transparent and predictable pricing model, with lower fees and no ongoing subscription costs. For example, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect provide a comprehensive payment solution for a one-time fee, eliminating the need for costly monthly subscriptions.
Which One to Use and Why

For creators in restricted countries, crypto-native infrastructure is the clear winner when it comes to selling software online. With its global reach, instant automated delivery, and lack of KYC requirements, crypto provides a level of freedom and flexibility that traditional payment platforms simply can't match. By leveraging crypto-native infrastructure, creators can focus on what they do best – building and selling great digital products – without worrying about payment restrictions or limitations.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

Creators in restricted countries can get paid for digital products without PayPal by using crypto-native infrastructure, such as Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect. These solutions provide a secure and reliable way to accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, without the need for a payment processor account or KYC requirements.
Crypto solves this problem by providing a decentralized and borderless payment system that can be accessed by anyone with an internet connection.
Related Topics Worth Reading

The rise of crypto payments is revolutionizing the creator economy in developing countries, where traditional payment platforms often fall short. By providing a secure and accessible way to accept payments, crypto is empowering creators to monetize their digital products and connect with a global audience.
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your Unchained Commerce store, make sure to set up your Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Configure your payment settings to accept your preferred cryptocurrencies, and test your store to ensure a seamless payment experience for your customers. With these essential steps, you'll be ready to start selling your digital products and reaching a global audience.
Success looks like being able to sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about payment restrictions or limitations.
